what: SOS WALK-rung NOVELTY micro-probe (the build go/no-go; ADR 0037 §4/§10.5)
verdict: RED — defer the SOS rung build; the binding constraint is the PRODUCER's frontier-encoding gap, not soundness/reach
frontier_steering_side_effect: DEGRADED quality — frontier vocabulary but more false/sign-inverted artifacts (~2 default -> ~5 frontier)
decisive_structural_finding: perfect anti-correlation: every plausibly_novel claim is in_sos_reach=NO; every in_sos_reach=YES claim is textbook_competition. The two desirable properties NEVER co-occur. The only backend-consumable claims are catalogued PSD-not-SOS landmarks (Motzkin/Choi-Lam/Robinson/Horn — appearing IDENTICALLY in both arms) + trivial Lyapunov forms; every genuine frontier target (Sidorenko C4, hypergraph Turan, clique density, copositivity, SOS-Lyapunov, proof-complexity lower bounds) is NOT a finite real-vector semialgebraic inequality (lives over graphon/flag moment bodies) OR a non-existence meta-statement OR false.
cross_backend_conclusion: confirmed across TWO independent sound backends (Walnut automatic-sequences run-3, SOS polynomial inequalities): the soundly-checkable AND finitely-encodable region IS the textbook region. The binding constraint is NOVELTY at the producer, manifesting as a structural ENCODING gap, not soundness, reach, or prover power.
recommended_fixes_before_reprobe: flag-algebra/graphon-moment encoder: conjecturer emits the finite flag-basis SDP variable space (Razborov reformulation) for density inequalities, not the scalar shadow with realizability stranded in prose
in-loop symbolic self-check inside the conjecturer (the sympy verification the assessors used) to kill the false/misformalized class pre-submission
reprobe_gate: build goes GREEN when the GREEN intersection is non-empty in even the default arm
